title: FlyORO Pushes Ã¢â‚¬ËœLast-MileÃ¢â‚¬â„¢ SAF Blending With Modular Airport Systems
content: FlyORO highlights its progress in advancing last mile Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) deployment by using modular airport systems that bring blending closer to where fuel is actually delivered, unlocking flexibility and reducing supply chain complexity while helping airports and airlines accelerate decarbonisation goals. The update celebrates FlyORO being featured in Aviation Week Network for its work in making SAF more accessible and practical for everyday operations through modular SAF blending solutions, supported by on site infrastructure that simplifies the process for regulators, airports and operators. The post notes that as the aviation industry scales SAF, this shift toward blending at the point of delivery allows for smoother integration and better understanding of the model in real world conditions. FlyORO emphasises the significance of showcasing real deployments, particularly with recent installations that demonstrate reliability and encourage confidence among stakeholders. The article also invites industry attendees to connect with FlyORO at the Singapore Airshow, offering an opportunity for deeper engagement around SAF, modular systems and sustainable aviation initiatives.
author: Analysts Account
